description:
Return a list of all rows from the Budget Detail Report for a Project and Budget View.

Note:
In addition to all the fields outlined in the response example, there will be an additional key for each visible,
non-formula, non-qualitative column (Ex: Original Budget Amount, Budget Modifications, Forecast to Complete, and Source Columns).

The integer keys returned represent the IDs of the budget columns which are returned by the Budget Detail Columns API.

As well, valid filter values can be fo...

biller.description: Information about the Project or Sub Job of a budget detail row

contract.description: Information about the Contract for a budget detail row.

cost_code.description: Information about the Cost Code for a budget detail row.

cost_type.description: Information about the Cost Type for a budget detail row.

description.description: Information about the record being returned by the Budget Detail Report

detail_type.description: Information about the type of a budget detail row

id.description: ID of a given budget detail row

item.description: Information about the budget detail row as it pertains to its source

link.description: Link to the source in the web app where a detail row can be found

root_cost_code.description: Information about the Division of a Cost Code for a budget detail row.

vendor.description: Information about the Vendor for a budget detail row.

biller.description: Sub Job Filter, can pass Sub Job or Project
